title: General Written Response Comments
description: Synthetic starter comment bank for testing general written-response review workflows.

comments.label: Accurate main idea
comments.text: Your main idea is clear and matches the task.

comments.label: Check a key detail
comments.text: Recheck one important detail so the response is fully accurate.

comments.label: Strong supporting example
comments.text: The supporting example helps explain the answer.

comments.label: Explanation needs detail
comments.text: Add more explanation so the reader can follow your thinking.

comments.label: Clear sequence
comments.text: The response is organized in a sequence that is easy to follow.

comments.label: Conclusion unclear
comments.text: Clarify the final sentence so it connects back to the main idea.
